feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Load standard fiori always
entry.content: is it possible Load standard fiori always even though user have created custom variant with filters?

entry.title: /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp is not a deployable CAP project.
entry.content:
have created a project and deployed several times to CF. since today i started facing error as /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp is not a deployable CAP project but there as no change to the project. 

 

Please guide what is missing in this?

entry.title: Not able to use Workflow capability when starting App from Business Application Studio.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I developed an App that uses the Workflow capabilites from SAP Build Process Automation. After deploying the App to the Launchpad, everything works fine (using managed application router).

But if I start the App from within BAS ("npm start") the fetching of the XSRF-Token fails. Read-Access on the Workflow service is working. 

I can read workflow instances etc. without problems but if I try to change something on an instance and therefore try to fetch a XSRF-Token it fails with "403 User does not have sufficient privileges." 

I am using the same user in BAS as in Launchpad, so I wonder why there should be an authorization Problem with my user.

This is my xs-app.json:

And this is the relevant part of my ui5.yaml:

I also tried these parameters, no success:

My User has these Roles:

 


Any hint is highly appreciated...

Regards,
Jürgen

entry.title: how to add a header message within the tile?
entry.content: Can we add a custom message at the fiori header.

entry.title: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I am currently involving on a SAP S/4HANA Public Edition implementation and we have some requirements that requires custom development. These developments must built using SAPUI5. I would like confirming if it is possible to implement these developments on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public. I have looked at documentation for that, but I have not found definitively answer.

Best regard,

Anthony

SAPUI5 SAP Fiori SAP ERP SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP Business Application Studio SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Intrastat data SAP4HANA help needed
entry.content:
Hello All Dear Users,

I need pull out data listed below from SAP4HANA to outside software and I am looking for advise if my required data can be pull out and where I can find them all.

 Arrivals /Dispatches                                                    

Commodity code*
Description of the goods
Nature of the transaction
Country of consignment
Country of origin
Net mass (weight) in KG
Supplementary units**
Invoice net amount in reporting currency
Statistical Invoice value
Mode of transport
Delivery terms
Port/Airport
Regime code
Region of destination
Supplier VAT number/Customer VAT number

entry.title: Type generator is not installed in your CDS Project
entry.content:
Hello All,

Using Joule, in SAP Build - Business Application Studio, when I try to generate an Entity and service using AI Joule, I am getting the error message: "TyperNotInstalledError: Will not attempt to generate types as the Type generator is not installed in your CDS Project. Install @cap-js/code-typer as dependency of your project to enable type generation for this project."

Is Joule not going to install the necessary files by itself?

What are the steps to be taken to overcome this issue?

Thanks,

Srihari

entry.title: Request failed with status code 403 in sap in Business application studio.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I have developed SAP Fiori report apps in BAS getting below error while deploying it on ABAP repository. i have cross-check with ABAP developer as well but not able to identify the root cause. Please look into this issue and provide solution ASAP.

below is the error which display while deploying app.

error builder:custom deploy-to-abap Request failed with status code 403 in sap

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Add Custom Action to Object Page Header toolbar using BAS Adaptation.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Please guide me to add Custom Action to Object Page Header toolbar using BAS Adaptation. I have seen and followed the article :

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/7619517a92414e27b71f02094bd08d06

and seen the sample :

https://ui5.sap.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/controllerExtensions/controllerExtensionsOverview

but the problem is: In adaptation project we dont have manifest.json but manifest.appdescr_variant , where when I am doing changes it is not working , how can i proceed with it.

Any help is highly appreciated.

Regards

Rakesh

entry.title: Fiori ALP Visual Filter display error in RAP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm experiencing an issue with displaying the Visual Filter on a Fiori app, which I generated using the List Page Template. On the app screen, the Visual Filter shows an error, and when I debug, it seems that the service encounters a problem with the orderby syntax. Please could you provide me with suggestions or documentation to resolve this issue? Thanks a lot.

Image display error

Image $batch request error
URL: GET Travel?$orderby=TotalPrice_sum%20desc&$apply=groupby((CurrencyCode,OverallStatus,OverallStatusText),aggregate(TotalPrice%20with%20sum%20as%20TotalPrice_sum))&$skip=0&$top=3

 

If I using orderby with other field its working fine
URL: GET Travel?$orderby=OverallStatus%20desc&$apply=groupby((CurrencyCode,OverallStatus,OverallStatusText),aggregate(TotalPrice%20with%20sum%20as%20TotalPrice_sum))&$skip=0&$top=3

entry.title: Deployment of Fiori application to CF: Issue with metadata/Odata calls
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have deployed a fiori application built using SAP BAS, where the datamodel was consumed from an onpremise S4HANA system.

 

Cloud connector and Destinations are configured. PFB Destination config

 

The app works fine in preview mode in BAS. Data from onpremise system is viewed properly. However, after deployment of app to cloud foundry, the metadata calls fail with status code 500 : error: 500 Internal Server Error.

Please let me know if there's anything else to be done. 

@gregorw , @Edrilan_Berisha , @N1kh1l 

 

Thanks & Regards,

Karthik

entry.title: IDOC FAILURE AT EWM SYSTEM
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have several idocs processed from ERP but are failing at EWM system. The idoc error is framed as- "No means of transport found for packaging material XXXXXXXX". If anyone has any idea on how to resolve this issue pls help urgently.

entry.title: How to enhance the Request Material(MDG) App Lean App ID(F0502)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Example Requirement: Enhance the Standard "Request Material(MDG)" app to have a Custom field and send to MDG backend staging table. From MDG the custom field will be mapped to standard Manufacture part number.

1) Front end: Is there any way to Enhance "Request Material(MDG)" via BAS and in BAS this app itself is not loading via adaptation project as the Fiori Library shows Enhancement points. In WEB IDE can we do extensions, we are using development tool BAS and how to get the license for webide full stack in BTP.

2) Backend: The Service Associated With the app is MDG_MATERIAL_SRV which should be extended with Z service can we use CFL instead of Append structure.

entry.title: How to retrieve value from modal window?
entry.content:
Hi!

Another problem with modal window, this time such one:

I can retrieve the value total available stock with text function, but I am not able to retrieve the values from the grey fields. I tried with property 

  • ShowMessageBox

but it doesn`t work. Also the tracker does not register these fields. Has someone any idea?

entry.title: My BAS dev space remains in status "Starting"
entry.content:
My BAS dev space remains in status "Starting" for a long time, ID "ws-4rjd9"

It is not a free account, How do resolve this? Any inputs?

entry.title: How to call a Rest API in a Fiori App and show the result in a List
entry.content:
I want to develop a Fiori App which i can later add to the Fiori Launchpad. The App should call a REST API, and the result of the API should be displayed as a list in the Fiori App. 

I did create a few Fiori Apps with the SAP Tutorials, like this one https://developers.sap.com/group.sap-fiori-app-purchase-req.html 

All the tutorials i completed used eclipse to create Services, which i can access from SAP Business Application Studio. I understand that these Services in Eclipse are so called CDS Views, which only show Data from a Database. Can i also show Data from a API in these CDS Views or do i need to use another Technology for my requirement?

The Fiori App should work in an On-Premise System and in the ABAP-Cloud.

entry.title: HANA Cloud / Hana procedure execution by multiple instances/workers
entry.content:
Hello Colleagues,

I have a procedure which mostly take some entries from a table(built as a queue) and then sends the values as input parameters to a calculation view and the result inserts in a table.
The thing is that the amount of records is huge(hundreds of millions) so i was searching for kind of paralel execution.
With the execute parallel explicit statement in a procedure it wouldn't work, because of concurency, but with multiple procedure runs it works.
Could anyone give me some insights in this direction? how to run multiple times the same proc to improve the processing time? Are there any limitations? Which setting should be changed in hana?


Thank you in advance,

Best regards,

Ghenadie

entry.title: Hello Experts, Is there a way to extend sap fiori app ( Request Material MDG ) in BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there a way to extend sap fiori app ( Request Material MDG ) in BAS. 

when creating adaptation project in BAS we are not getting the option to extend for this particular app. 

or is there any other way to extend this app. 

P.S : SAP WEB IDE is not available as account is in cloud foundry environment.

entry.title: MEXC Referral Code: 1huHd (MEXC Register Bonus in 2024)
entry.content:
MEXC Referral Code: 1huHd (MEXC Register Bonus in 2024)

The MEXC referral code “1huHd“ is a special code that not only helps you reduce trading fees but also enables you to extend these benefits to your friends and fellow traders. In this article, we delve into the advantages of the referral program, and the conditions for participation, and guide you on applying this code to enhance your overall trading journey.

What is MEXC Referral Code?

The MEXC Referral Code "1huHd" is a unique identifier provided by the MEXC exchange in 2024. This code enables current users to refer others to participate in trading on the MEXC platform. New users who register using the referral code "1huHd" receive a 50% discount on all trading fees and can claim a signup bonus of up to 5,000 USDT.
Referral codes typically offer users a personalized way to invite others, whether friends, family, or anyone keen on joining the MEXC platform. Occasionally, broader referral codes may be available during specific promotions or marketing campaigns, but for a limited time. Staying informed about these opportunities is vital. You can do so by keeping an eye on MEXC’s official website, announcements, or social media channels to receive updates tailored to your trading preferences.

How to use the MEXC Referral Code 1huHd

Register for a new account using the MEXC referral code 1huHd to receive a sign-up bonus of up to $5,000 USDT and enjoy a trading fee discount of up to 50%!
MEXC offers a user-friendly platform with a wide range of cryptocurrencies available for trading. Take advantage of our exclusive promo code to start trading on MEXC and ensure you capitalize on the provided discount and complimentary sign-up bonus!
To avail of the MEXC promotion, simply follow these steps:
1. Register for a new account using the MEXC referral code 1huHd.
2. Visit the MEXC rewards center and complete tasks to earn a bonus of up to $5,000 USDT.
3. Obtain a 50% discount on trading fees by holding 1000 MX tokens.
These simple actions enable you to unlock the advantages of the MEXC promotion, allowing you to maximize your potential rewards and benefit from lower trading expenses.

How to Register an Account with MEXC Referral Code 1huHd

To access the trading discount and seize potential sign-up bonuses through the MEXC referral program, just follow these uncomplicated steps:

Navigate to the MEXC Global registration page.
Ensure you input the referral code 1huHd in the designated field while signing up; refer to the image for clarification.
Complete the registration and KYC process.
Initiate trading by making a deposit.
Hold MX tokens, MEXC’s native exchange token, and automatically enjoy a 50% discount on trading fees. Exciting, right?
Additionally, explore diverse avenues to earn rewards:
Engage in Trading Futures, M-Day, and Futures Bonus Pool for enticing offers.
Participate in Monthly Futures Competitions boasting substantial prize pools.
Holding MEXC’s native token (MX) can render you eligible for airdrops and exclusive MEXC launchpad promotions.
These straightforward actions not only ensure you benefit from reduced trading fees but also open doors to various rewarding opportunities within the MEXC platform.

MEXC Referral Code FAQs

What is the MEXC Referral Code 2024?

The MEXC Referral Code 2024 is 1huHd.

What is the referral code for MEXC wallet?


The referral code for MEXC Global is “mexc-1huHd,” which is a unique code generated by the MEXC exchange. Users can utilize this MEXC affiliate program to receive a bonus upon registering for a MEXC exchange account.

What is MEXC signup code?

To utilize the MEXC Referral Code, simply sign up for a new account using the MEXC referral code 1huHd. By doing so, you can claim a sign-up bonus of up to $1,000 USDT and enjoy up to a 50% discount on trading fees! MEXC provides a user-friendly platform and offers a diverse range of cryptocurrencies for trading.

What advantages does MEXC referral code 1huHd bring?

You enjoy a 50% discount on trading fees, coupled with the opportunity to claim sign-up bonuses of up to $5,000 USDT on the MEXC trading platform.

How do I claim my bonus on MEXC?

Just create an account, make a deposit, and you can receive a bonus ranging from $100 to $20,000, depending on your deposited amounts and trading volume."

entry.title: OKX Referral Code: 69809443 ( OKX App Referral Code 2024 )
entry.content:
OKX Referral Code: 69809443 ( OKX App Referral Code 2024 )

Are you in search of an OKX referral code? Use the code 69809443 during your OKX signup to claim a special bonus applicable for the year 2024. Spread the word by sharing your referral code with friends and family to benefit from a 50% reduction in trading fees. OKX is renowned globally as a highly secure cryptocurrency exchange, offering a reliable platform for buying Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, EOS, and a variety of other cryptocurrencies.

What is OKX Referral Code?

Utilize the referral code 69809443 within the OKX app to activate a continuous discount on your trading fees. Moreover, take advantage of the chance to earn up to 50% in trading commissions for every successful referral when you persuade your friends to register using the OKX referral code. It's a mutually beneficial scenario for both you and your network as you explore the realm of cryptocurrency trading on OKX.

What is the best OKX referral code in 2024?
The suggested OKX Referral Code for maximizing benefits is 69809443. Applying this code during registration guarantees you a generous bonus valued at up to $10,000. Improve your experience by sharing the code with friends, allowing you to earn a significant 50% commission. This means you have the potential to obtain the maximum sign-up bonus of $10,000 in USDT as a welcoming gesture. Starting your trading journey becomes even more thrilling as you enjoy extra perks and invite others to join in rewarding experiences.

How to use the OKX referral code?
Sign up on OKX using the referral code 69809443 and unlock access to various ongoing promotions, including the alluring new user mystery box offer.
This post serves as a beginner-friendly guide for navigating OKX, ideal for individuals new to cryptocurrency exchanges. Keep an eye out for an upcoming detailed tutorial guide that will break down every button and feature. For now, let's begin by exploring the home screen. If you've already registered with the referral code, please log in; if not, feel free to create a new account to start your cryptocurrency journey.

OKX Sign Up Bonus
Here's how to quickly create an account with OKX:

1. Visit the OKX website and click on "Register" located at the top right corner.
2. Enter your email address as prompted.
3. Input the Referral code: 69809443.
4. Check your inbox for the OKX verification email.
5. Copy the verification code from the email.
6. Paste the code into the designated "Enter code" field on the page.
7. Click on "Next."
8. Create a strong password containing uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters.

OKX Referral Code FAQs

What is the referral code for OKX?

The referral code for OKX is "69809443".

What is the recommended referral code for OKX?

For 2024, use the referral code "69809443" to unlock new user bonus benefits at OKX. Established in 2017 by Jay Hao, OKX is recognized as one of the world's top-rated cryptocurrency exchanges. Its operations span across various countries, including India, Malta, and Seychelles.

How can I locate my OKX referral code?

Log in to your account on okx.com, then navigate to More > Referral, or use the OKX app to access the Referral page. Share either your invitation link or invitation code with your friends to encourage them to register for an OKX account.
